allow: Bash(python -c "import sys,json; r=json.load\(sys.stdin\)['result']; print\('status:', r['status']\); print\('block :', int\(r['blockNumber'],16\)\); print\('logs  :', len\(r['logs']\)\); print\('log topic0:', r['logs'][0]['topics'][0] if r['logs'] else 'none'\); print\('log data len:', len\(r['logs'][0]['data']\) if r['logs'] else 0\)")
